summary: Jerry’s soaring guitar shines through a thin, low‑mid‑focused recording, delivering a powerful set highlighted by “High Time” and the historic China Cat Sunflower > I Know You Rider sequence.
review: The show is praised for high‑quality playing and memorable moments, especially Jerry Garcia’s cutting lead tone on “High Time” and the first‑time pairing of China Cat Sunflower into I Know You Rider.  The recording suffers from a lack of top end that makes it sound dated, but the overall punch keeps it listenable for fans.

ai_rating.rationale: Most reviewers rate the performance highly (average ~4.6) while noting clear deficiencies in the audio quality (average ~2.8); weighted combination yields a solid 4‑star rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Listeners note a thin, low‑mid‑heavy sound with missing top end; the recording is described as “low quality” and a possible turn‑off for those used to clearer tapes, though it remains listenable.

standout_songs: China Cat Sunflower > I Know You Rider
show_quality.setlist_flow: The set is described as timeless and powerful, with historic first‑time sequencing that adds excitement despite the audio limitations.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Garcia’s guitar cuts through everything and is highlighted as a major strength of the performance.
